flashcards.back: Binary search is an efficient algorithm for finding an item from a sorted list of items.

flashcards.front: What is the time complexity of binary search?
flashcards.back: The time complexity of binary search is O(log n).

flashcards.front: What is the space complexity of binary search?
flashcards.back: The space complexity of binary search is O(1).

flashcards.front: What is the main advantage of binary search?
flashcards.back: The main advantage of binary search is that it is faster for large lists.

flashcards.front: What is the main disadvantage of binary search?
flashcards.back: The main disadvantage of binary search is that it requires the list to be sorted.
